title: Closed Agent Claims Archive
description: Durable archive of claims that have left active-claims.json. Closed claims preserve the original claim body and add structured closure metadata for explicit, stale, and owner-forced closure.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of the closed-claims archive schema. Version 1.1.0 adds required closure metadata while preserving the original claim body.

claims.description: Claims that have left the active registry. Each entry preserves the original claim and records how it closed.
